"We'll basically just issue money to people, really just because the output of goods and services will so far exceed the money supply that effectively you have deflation because deflation is just the ratio of the outputs of goods and services to the money supply."

user.name: Jeffrey Towson 陶迅
user.description: I help increase online growth and strengthen digital AI moats. Digital & AI mgmt consultant. Get my free email and Tech Strategy podcast.

fullText:
WHAT SETS GALBOT ROBOTS APART

I recently visited the Galbot HQ in Beijing. 

Here’s a video of the logistics / warehouse use case. 

Here’s how they describe their advantages. 

1: Centralized Compute and Control

Unified HPU + XCU architecture for low-latency inference + motion control with tightly synced perception & commands.

2: Reliability

G1 robot joints fully validated — 3M+ full-range motion cycles under rated load in tough real-world conditions.

3: Endurance

6–8 hours on a single charge, optimized for retail standby-and-work cycles.

4: Heavy-Duty Power

S1 robot handles up to 50 kg payloads in demanding industrial settings.

5: Dexterity

21 DoF with robust pick-and-place for objects & parcels.

6: Supply Chain Edge

Leveraging China’s world-class ecosystem for superior cost efficiency.

#galbot #robots

fullText:
WHY ENERGY STORAGE IS CATL’S NEXT GROWTH ENGINE

I recently visited CATL HQ in Fujian.

Their current push into Energy Storage is important.

1: Energy storage is CATLs next major growth engine after dominating EV batteries. 

Their flagship product is TENER, which was unveiled in 2024.

It’s the world’s first mass producible system with five year zero degradation.

2: CATLs TENER product line focuses on:

-Higher energy density

-Smaller footprints

-Specialized versions for different environments. 

Each container has 6.25 MWh capacity, which is 30 percent higher energy density than previous systems.

3: There are 5 main use cases for energy storage, led by power grids.

Power grids represent 70 to 80 percent of total installed megawatt hour capacity.

Read here for more.

#catl

https://t.co/Dt99hjZJdD

user.name: clem 🤗
user.description: Co-founder & CEO @HuggingFace 🤗, the open and collaborative platform for AI builders

fullText:
Let’s face it: after-the-fact API guardrails are not the right safety tool for frontier models.

They don’t make dangerous capabilities disappear. They just hide them behind a brittle interface that can be easily jailbroken.

A better safety agenda:

- don’t train models for very high-risk capabilities without strong evals, justification, and containment

- use staged release, as pioneered by @IreneSolaiman, from trusted testers to broader access, and open release for transparency and accountability

- massively support open-source AI so the gap between players does not become so large that a few closed labs and governments end up with overwhelming capabilities and power over everyone else

- enable independent evaluation instead of asking everyone to trust a black-box API

- give law enforcement, courts, regulators, auditors, journalists, and civil society strong AI tools to detect, investigate, and hold accountable unlawful uses of AI

Safety means transparency, staged deployment, distributed power, and making sure democratic institutions can actually enforce the law.

fullText:
Announcing OpenSharing SecureConnect to simplify networking configuration for data sharing

OpenSharing introduces a Databricks-managed proxy for storage access. Providers configure storage access once, making it easier to onboard new recipients without the firewall changes and network coordination that often slow down data sharing.

Optionally, data providers can use NCC for SecureConnect to access provider storage over private connectivity.

Now in Public Preview. https://t.co/WWuCDw5PXD
